hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We're here to help — reach out today

introduction.text: Whether you need to schedule an appointment, ask about insurance, or have a question about a procedure — we're happy to help. Reach out by phone, email, or the form below.

contactMethods.title: Phone
contactMethods.description: Call us during office hours or leave a message anytime

contactMethods.title: Email
contactMethods.description: We respond to all emails within 1 business day

contactMethods.title: Visit Us
contactMethods.description: Conveniently located near Crystal Run Crossing with free parking

hours.title: Office Hours
hours.note: Same-day emergency appointments available during office hours

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 1 business day
form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out! We'll get back to you within 1 business day.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

map.title: Find Us
map.directions: Conveniently located near Crystal Run Crossing, with free parking available for all patients.

emergency.title: Dental Emergency?
emergency.message: If you're experiencing a dental emergency, don't wait — call us now for same-day care.

items.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
items.answer: Please bring a valid photo ID, your dental insurance card (if applicable), and a list of current medications.

items.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
items.answer: We prioritize scheduled appointments but will accommodate walk-ins when possible. For emergencies, call us first and we'll work to get you in the same day.

items.question: Is parking available?
items.answer: Yes, we have free parking directly in front of our office at 85 Crystal Run Road.
